title: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

detail.title: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket
detail.short_info: TS EAMCET 2026 admit card released at eapcet.tgche.ac.in for Engineering streams. Download TG EAPCET hall ticket using registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number and DOB, and check exam dates 4–5 and 9–11 May 2026, shift timing and exam‑day instructions here.

content.text: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU) Hyderabad, on behalf of the Telangana Council of Higher Education (TGCHE), has released the TS EAMCET 2026 admit card (TG EAPCET hall ticket) on the official portal eapcet.tgche.ac.in. The hall ticket for Agriculture & Pharmacy (A&P) stream was issued on 23 April 2026, while the TS EAMCET 2026 admit card for the Engineering stream has been released on 27 April 2026. Candidates who have successfully registered can now log in using their registration number, qualifying exam (Intermediate) hall ticket number and date of birth to download the TS EAMCET 2026 admit card.

According to the official exam schedule, TS EAMCET 2026 will be held in computer‑based mode, with Agriculture & Pharmacy exams on 4 and 5 May 2026 and Engineering exams on 9, 10 and 11 May 2026 at designated test centres across Telangana.
Direct Link to Download TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

links.text: Direct Link to Download TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

sections.heading: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket - Overview

headers: AP EAMCET 2026 / AP EAPCET 2026 (Engineering, Agriculture & Pharmacy Common Entrance Test)
rows: JNTU Kakinada on behalf of APSCHE
Registration Number, Qualifying Exam (10+2) Hall Ticket Number, and Date of Birth

sections.heading: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket Download Link

content.text: TSCHE has activated the direct link to download TS EAMCET 2026 engineering hall ticket on the TG EAPCET official portal. Candidates must visit eapcet.tgche.ac.in and click on the 'Download Hall Ticket' link for TG EAPCET-2026, then choose the Engineering stream and log in with their credentials to access the admit card. The hall ticket download window will remain open till the exam dates, but students are advised to download and check their TS EAMCET Engineering Hall Ticket 2026 well in advance to avoid last-minute issues.

sections.heading: How To Download TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

content.text: Candidates should follow the official steps below to download their TS EAMCET 2026 admit card online:

items: Visit the TS EAMCET/TG EAPCET official website: https://eapcet.tgche.ac.in.
On the homepage, click on the link titled “Download Hall Ticket (TG EAPCET‑2026)” or “TS EAMCET 2026 Hall Ticket”.
Select your stream (Agriculture & Pharmacy or Engineering) if prompted.
Enter your TS EAMCET 2026 Registration Number, Qualifying Exam Hall Ticket Number (Intermediate/Class 12) and Date of Birth in DD/MM/YYYY format.
Click on the “Get Hall Ticket” / “Submit” button. The TS EAMCET 2026 admit card will be displayed on the screen.
Verify your name, photograph, stream, exam date, shift timing and exam centre details carefully, then download and print 2–3 copies of the hall ticket.

content.text: If candidates forget their registration details, they can use the “Forgot Registration Number” or similar options on the portal, or contact the TS EAMCET helpline.

sections.heading: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Exam Dates And Timings

content.text: According to the official exam schedule, the TS EAMCET 2026 engineering examinations will be conducted from 9 to 11 May 2026. The test will be held in two shifts on the exam days: Forenoon session from 9:00 AM to 12:00 Noon and Afternoon session from 3:00 PM to 6:00 PM. The exact date and shift allotted to each candidate will be printed on the TS EAMCET engineering hall ticket and must be followed strictly.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned On TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

content.text: The TS EAMCET 2026 admit card contains key information which candidates must check thoroughly:

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature
Registration number and TS EAMCET hall ticket number
Stream - Engineering (E) or Agriculture & Pharmacy (A&P)
Exam date and session (forenoon/afternoon)
Reporting time and gate closing time
Examination centre name, code and full address
Gender, category and local/non‑local status (if applicable)
Important exam‑day instructions and guidelines

content.text: Any discrepancy such as incorrect name, photograph, stream or exam centre should be reported immediately to the TS EAMCET helpdesk/JNTUH for correction before the exam.

sections.heading: Documents Required With TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Hall Ticket

content.text: On the exam day, candidates must bring the following to the TS EAMCET 2026 test centre:

items: A printed copy of TS EAMCET 2026 admit card (clear A4‑size printout).
A valid photo ID proof such as: Aadhaar Card Voter ID PAN Card Passport Driving Licence School/College ID (if accepted)
Aadhaar Card
Voter ID
PAN Card
Passport
Driving Licence
School/College ID (if accepted)
A copy of the filled‑in TS EAMCET application form with a recent photograph affixed, if specified in instructions.

content.text: Candidates without the hall ticket and valid ID proof will not be allowed to enter the exam hall.
